name: MEGA65 Quad-Mode
description: MEGA65 project focused on 32-bit 45GS02 quad instructions and extended registers.

files.content:
; Project: {{PROJECT_NAME}}
.target mega65
.org {{START_ADDR}}

; Enable 45GS02 extended mode (SEE)
; Note: Simulator starts with E=1 by default

start:
    cle ; Clear E bit (enable 16-bit SP and other features)
    
    ; Load 32-bit value into Q (A,X,Y,Z combination)
    ; Using quad-instruction prefix $42 $42
    lda #$11
    ldx #$22
    ldy #$33
    ldz #$44
    ; At this point Q = $44332211

    ; Perform a quad addition or other 32-bit ops here...
    
    see ; Restore E bit before returning to BASIC/Monitor if needed
    rts
